rows.injected_change: Disconnect the input source or electrode path.
rows.observed_effect: Output becomes floating, zero, or dominated by noise depending on bias path.
rows.student_explanation: The measured signal path is broken before the modeled filter can act.
rows.risk_mitigation: Add connectivity checks and teach students to verify reference nodes first.

rows.injected_change: Force the filter capacitor impedance toward zero.
rows.observed_effect: Nominal cutoff 40.81 Hz is no longer meaningful because the output node is effectively shorted.
rows.student_explanation: A shorted shunt capacitor can clamp the output node or destroy the intended pole.
rows.risk_mitigation: Probe both sides of the capacitor and flag near-zero impedance faults.

rows.fault: Wrong capacitor unit: nF vs uF
rows.observed_effect: If C is 1000x too small, cutoff shifts from 40.81 Hz to 4.081e+04 Hz; if 1000x too large, it shifts to 0.04081 Hz.
rows.student_explanation: Unit-prefix mistakes move the cutoff by orders of magnitude.
rows.risk_mitigation: Run a parameter sanity check before simulation and display SI prefixes in reports.

rows.injected_change: Limit output to assumed supply rails.
rows.observed_effect: Waveform clips; small-signal frequency response no longer predicts output amplitude.
rows.student_explanation: Active stages can leave their linear operating region.
rows.risk_mitigation: Add output range requirements and inspect saturation source highlights.

rows.injected_change: Lower sampling frequency below Nyquist margin.
rows.observed_effect: High-frequency content aliases into the measurement band.
rows.student_explanation: Sampling is part of the measurement system, not a cosmetic detail.
rows.risk_mitigation: Add an fs >= 2*fmax requirement and sweep sampling frequency.

rows.observed_effect: Output shows residual line-frequency content if filtering or shielding is insufficient.
rows.student_explanation: Biomedical front-ends are sensitive to common-mode and environmental pickup.
rows.risk_mitigation: Measure 60 Hz attenuation and include grounding/shielding assumptions.

rows.observed_effect: Signal-to-noise ratio drops; small feature detection becomes unreliable.
rows.student_explanation: Noise can hide physiological or low-amplitude circuit behavior.
rows.risk_mitigation: Log SNR and compare expected versus measured noise floor.

rows.injected_change: Decrease load resistance at the output node.
rows.observed_effect: The output node is pulled away from the ideal unloaded response.
rows.student_explanation: Measurement equipment and downstream stages can alter the circuit under test.
rows.risk_mitigation: Add input/load impedance requirements and teach loading as a failure mode.
